'''sagozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloidine|xyloidine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloidine|xyloidine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sagozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægezeth|sægezeth]] || [[word:sægezej|sægezej]] || [[word:sægezesh|sægezesh]] || [[word:sægeze|sægeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagogozoth|sagogozoth]] || [[word:sagogozoj|sagogozoj]] || [[word:sagogozosh|sagogozosh]] || [[word:sagogozo|sagogozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagozoth|sagozoth]] || [[word:sagozoj|sagozoj]] || [[word:sagozosh|sagozosh]] || [[word:sagozo|sagozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagofzoth|sagofzoth]] || [[word:sagofzoj|sagofzoj]] || [[word:sagofzosh|sagofzosh]] || [[word:sagofzof|sagofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagozotho|sagozotho]] || [[word:sagozojo|sagozojo]] || [[word:sagozosho|sagozosho]] || [[word:sagozoko|sagozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagozoth|sagozoth]] || [[word:sagozoj|sagozoj]] || [[word:sagozosh|sagozosh]] || [[word:sagozo|sagozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagozothol|sagozothol]] || [[word:sagozojol|sagozojol]] || [[word:sagozoshol|sagozoshol]] || [[word:sagozokol|sagozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagozothotho|sagozothotho]] || [[word:sagozojojo|sagozojojo]] || [[word:sagozoshosho|sagozoshosho]] || [[word:sagozoko|sagozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagozothon|sagozothon]] || [[word:sagozojon|sagozojon]] || [[word:sagozoshon|sagozoshon]] || [[word:sagozokon|sagozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagozothoro|sagozothoro]] || [[word:sagozojoro|sagozojoro]] || [[word:sagozoshoro|sagozoshoro]] || [[word:sagozokoro|sagozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
